subject: v2.2.5
body: ## [2.2.5](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v2.2.4...v2.2.5) (2017-11-20) ### Bug Fixes * **searchbox:** fix usage of custom reset template ([#2585](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2585)) ([aad92b9](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/aad92b9)), closes [#2528](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2528)
